_comment: Chronar Meeting — Post-Boss Dialogue (Realm of Time) | Phase: 3 | Priority: HIGH (Critical) | First face-to-face meeting with a Primordial after defeating the Spirit of Time.

scenes.text: The Realm falls silent. Time flows naturally for the first time since you arrived.
A figure appears. No weapon. No armor. Only exhaustion carved into ancient features.

scenes.speaker: Chronar
scenes.text: Which moment made you believe revenge could heal grief?

scenes.speaker: Chronar
scenes.text: That night haunts you because you survived it. Not because you remember it.

scenes.speaker: Chronar
scenes.text: Honest. That is rarer than you realize.

scenes.speaker: Chronar
scenes.text: Silence is also an answer. Perhaps the wisest one you've given.

scenes.speaker: Kael
scenes.text: Enough. Tell me what happened to my parents.

scenes.speaker: Chronar
scenes.text: Every answer has its proper time. Reach the end of your journey... then judge us.
